title: euphorbia squamosa var. serrata
intro: Euphorbia squamosa var. serrata is a plant species, commonly known as the Chinese wolf's bane or tiger's bane, which belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Euphorbia squamosa var. serrata are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
